2026-04-23T04:12:01.6784806Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-23T04:12:01.6785761Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-23T04:12:01.6786588Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
